title: RSVP for a Summer Tour
excerpt: Tour Camp Barney Medintz while we’re in session to feel the excitement and magic of camp in action! RSVPs are required. Note: Summer Tours are open to families who do not have children at CBM during Summer 2026 at the time of the tour.
contentHtml:
Tour Camp Barney Medintz while we’re in session to feel the excitement and magic of camp in action! RSVPs are required.

Note: Summer Tours are open to families who do not have children at CBM during Summer 2026 at the time of the tour.
contentText:
Tour Camp Barney Medintz while we’re in session to feel the excitement and magic of camp in action! RSVPs are required.

Note: Summer Tours are open to families who do not have children at CBM during Summer 2026 at the time of the tour.
